reviews.comment:
ENERO 2024:
Lamentablemente como todo lo de YPF, cada vez peor en todos los rubros, carísimo en repuestos,  en lubricantes y accesorios, ni hablar en el serviclub. Lo único que le falta es bajar la calidad,  ya media, de las naftas.
Le subo una estrella por la atención del personal,  que pese a ser lentos son amables y solícitos.
Cada vez trato más de alejarme de lo que es YPF.

(Translated by Google)
JANUARY 2024:
Unfortunately, like everything at YPF, it's getting worse in every area. Parts, lubricants, and accessories are incredibly expensive, not to mention the service center. The only thing missing is a drop in the already average quality of the gasoline.
I'm giving it a star for the staff's service, who, despite being slow, are friendly and helpful.
I'm increasingly trying to distance myself from what YPF is all about.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkLU82S1lREAE

reviews.comment:
En los surtidires no se identifica cual visor son litros y cual es el precio. Cargue super. Me quisieron cobrar los litros cuando tenia que cobrarme lo del otro visor que en este caso era menor. A estar atentos.

(Translated by Google)
The pumps don't show which display is liter or what the price is. I charged super. They tried to charge me for the liters when they should have charged me for the other display, which in this case was less. Be careful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkcUwySGh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca nunca nunca nos atendieron en un tiempo razonable....aunque tengas 4, 5 o 10 autos adelante....es casi seguro que demoras más de una hora.

(Translated by Google)
They never, ever, ever served us in a reasonable time... even if there are 4, 5 or 10 cars ahead of you... it's almost certain that you'll wait more than an hour.
